channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly Tipping Truman’s Road, 4th April
item.description:
Given that the street looks like a dumping ground, unsurprisingly for the third time this week alone there’s lots of junk that’s been fly tipped all over the road. Something needs to be done to police this better.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gully - rain gushes over the top. This one is between numbers 86 and 84.., 4th April
item.description:
Blocked for several years, adding to flooding at the bottom of the hill. One of several blocked gullies on woodland terrace.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodland Terrace, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent: Truman’s Road Strewn in Food Waste, Litter & Broken Glass, 4th April
item.description:
Despite being told there are daily Barrow Beat cleans carried out on the street, there has been large amounts of broken glass, food waste and litter all across Truman’s Road for the past two days. It’s a huge health hazard and simply disgusting.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salcombe Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has dumped a bag of clothes and what looks like medical waste (used disposable gloves, facemasks), 4th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped a bag of clothes and used medical waste outside 4 Rochdale Road SE1 0XD. The bag has split and it’s being strewn everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rochdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus shelter graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
Offensive racist graffiti
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (offensive)

item.title: 50inch pothole, 4th April
item.description:
Upon entry into Avenue Road Car Park there’s a massive hole - which damaged my car and a flat tyre

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlands Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 15, 4th April
item.description:
Bikes have been locked to the bike rack without moving for many months, if not years.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brecon Mews, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic sign no longer needed, 4th April
item.description:
Presumably related to previous road closure in Clerkenwell Close, road no longer closed. Please remove the sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, St. John Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle has not moved since before Christmas, 4th April
item.description:
Open tipper trunk - which has not moved since before Christmas. Back of vehicle is attracting rubbish, old clothes and general rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Camden, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 4th April
item.description:
Graffiti on sogn and on path in Riverside Gardens, some offensive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 10 Andwell Close: pile of rubbish., 4th April
item.description:
The rubbish is next to a hedge along the pathway from 10 Andwell Close to Mountjoy Close.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanbrook Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree uprooted and blocking pavement, 4th April
item.description:
Tree has been uprooted (suspect deliberate as support pole etc still attached) and lying across pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Thornhill Avenue, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 4th April
item.description:
More rubbish dumped at the bottom of Majendie Road (SE18 7QB), close to where it meets Brewery Road. Bin bags and a car seat.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 4th April
item.description:
Someone has decided to dump their rubbish in the trees

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rochester Drive, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poker game poster flyposted at traffic lights at Manor House, 4th April
item.description:
There are a number of ‘Poker game’ handwritten posters which have appeared in and around Hackney. Please remove this one which has been attached to the traffic lights at the junction of Green Lanes and Seven Sisters heading south before further posters appear. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seven Sisters Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic bucket on pavement and pedestrian crossing., 4th April
item.description:
This bucket has been here for a couple of weeks partly blocking pavement and pedestrian crossing on Graham Road opposite 151 Graham Road, A1207. Please fix.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandon forest bike, 4th April
item.description:
Abandon forest bike constantly same location middle of pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, West Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rushing bags spilled all over the place, 4th April
item.description:
Bigs all over the place

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frampton Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horse manure slip hazard, 4th April
item.description:
Horse manure in road: 1) slip hazard for cyclists and motorcyclists as rider did not move it to the kerb. 2) in front of driveway so will spread and cause further mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heathwood Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Improper repair to road markings, 4th April
item.description:
Two men have been repaniting the road with black paint and yellow spray cans. Unclear why.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
